# Daily Report — 2026-06-27

## Task Completed
Added `list_change_schedule_spans` tool (GET cmn_schedule_span table). Lists time-block
spans within a cmn_schedule change window. Supports filtering by parent schedule
(sys_id or name, auto-resolved via `_resolve_change_schedule_sys_id`), day of week
(0=Sunday…6=Saturday, validated ge=0/le=6), repeat type (none/daily/weekly/monthly/yearly),
and span name substring. Response includes `day_of_week_label` ("Monday", "Tuesday", etc.)
derived from the numeric value, plus start/end times, all_day flag, repeat_until, and
full pagination (has_more/next_offset). Registered in `__init__.py`, `tool_utils.py`, and
`config/tool_packages.yaml` (change_coordinator and full packages).

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1873
- Coverage: 93%
- All passing: yes

## Security
System-level dependency advisories only (setuptools CVE-2024-6345, urllib3 PYSEC-2026-141/142,
wheel CVE-2026-24049). No vulnerabilities in project code.

- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — import + TOOLS dict entry
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — change_coordinator and full packages
- `tests/test_list_change_schedule_spans.py` — 31 new tests
- `.github/DAILY_BACKLOG.md` — item 1 moved to Completed
